brief_title: Pembrolizumab (MK-3475) Plus Chemotherapy Versus Placebo Plus Chemotherapy in Participants Gastric or Gastroesophageal Junction (GEJ) Adenocarcinoma (MK-3475-859/KEYNOTE-859)-China Extension
official_title: A Phase 3, Randomized, Double-blind Clinical Study of Pembrolizumab (MK-3475) Plus Chemotherapy Versus Placebo Plus Chemotherapy as First-line Treatment in Participants With HER2 Negative, Previously Untreated, Unresectable or Metastatic Gastric Orgastroesophageal Junction Adenocarcinoma (KEYNOTE-859)
